/opt/cross-pi-gcc-12.2.0-64/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-g++    -fsigned-char -W -Wall -Wreturn-type -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Waddress -Wsequence-point -Wformat -Wformat-security -Wmissing-declarations -Wundef -Winit-self -Wpointer-arith -Wshadow -Wsign-promo -Wuninitialized -Wsuggest-override -Wno-delete-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-comment -Wimplicit-fallthrough=3 -Wno-strict-overflow -fdiagnostics-show-option -pthread -fomit-frame-pointer -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections    -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -O3 -DNDEBUG  -DNDEBUG   -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--no-undefined CMakeFiles/opencv_model_diagnostics.dir/model_diagnostics.cpp.o -o ../../bin/opencv_model_diagnostics  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: -ldl -lm -lpthread -lrt ../../lib/libopencv_core.a ../../lib/libopencv_dnn.a ../../lib/libopencv_imgproc.a ../../lib/libopencv_core.a -lm -lpthread -lrt ../../3rdparty/lib/libzlib.a ../../3rdparty/lib/libittnotify.a -ldl ../../3rdparty/lib/libtegra_hal.a ../../3rdparty/lib/liblibprotobuf.a
